message:
chore(storage): drop unused MessageInsertSubstageProfile::absorb + silence unused param

Two small cleanups in src/storage/sqlite.rs after the recent
profiling instrumentation landed:

1. `MessageInsertSubstageProfile::absorb()` was added so the
   per-call substage profile could compose with the outer
   `InsertConversationTreePerfProfile`'s aggregation, but the
   final wiring ended up updating the outer struct's fields
   directly inside the inserter rather than absorbing a separate
   sub-profile per call. The helper is now dead; #[cfg(test)] code
   isn't surfaced by `cargo build` warnings either way, but
   leaving it as bait for a future "use the helper" misread is
   worse than just removing it.

2. `append_existing_conversation_with_profile` accepts a
   `workspace_id: Option<i64>` argument that the function does not
   reference (the existing conversation row already has its
   workspace association recorded; the parameter was added in case
   we ever wanted to override it for cross-workspace appends, and
   has stayed unused). Rename to `_workspace_id` so the unused-
   argument warning stops nagging without changing the public
   shape of the helper.

No behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
